CustomField.label: If Query Returns Multiple Rows
CustomField.description: Required for Single query and Compare two queries checks. Tells the framework how to read a result that has more than one row. For COUNT() / SUM() and other aggregate queries, choose One result (or aggregate) - they return one aggregate row even when many records match, so the row-by-row options do not apply.

value.label: At least one row must pass

CustomField.inlineHelpText: One result = expect a single row or a COUNT()/SUM(). At least one row must pass = any row passing is enough. Every row must pass = all rows must pass. Compare as two lists = needed for the list operators and Compare two queries.
